title: EML-COMP-THEORY-2026-APPENDIX-v0_1
theory_name: DSCM (Depth-Stratified Computational Model) and T = Cl formal appendix

primitives.description: Configuration space at depth d in the depth-stratified computational model
primitives.evidence: $\{M_d\}_{d \in \mathbb{N}}$ 是計算空間族，$M_d$ 是深度 $d$ 的配置空間（configuration space）。

primitives.description: Projection operator family mapping depth d+1 states to depth d observable representation
primitives.evidence: $\Pi_d : M_{d+1} \to M_d$ 是投影算子族，將深度 $d+1$ 的狀態投影至深度 $d$ 的可觀測表示。

primitives.description: Inclusion operator family representing computational descent into depth d+1 (function call semantics)
primitives.evidence: $\iota_d : M_d \to M_{d+1}$ 是包含算子族，表示深度 $d$ 的計算「下潛」至深度 $d+1$（函數呼叫語義）。

primitives.description: Composition constraint set specifying legal inter-depth interactions
primitives.evidence: $\mathcal{C}$ 是組合約束集，規定合法的深度間交互。

primitives.description: Depth halting problem: whether program P on input x eventually fully ascends to depth d=0
primitives.evidence: 深度停機問題問：$$DH(P, x) = \begin{cases} 1 & \text{若 } P \text{ 在輸入 } x \text{ 上的深度遍歷最終完全浮出至 } d=0 \\ 0 & \text{否則} \end{cases}$$

primitives.description: The transparent, infinite-dimensional, pure-structure entity defined by four properties and argued to equal S^infinity
primitives.evidence:
設 T 被定義為：
1. 透明（無本質屬性，僅有關係結構）
2. 無限維（不被任何有限維度描述）

primitives.description: The limit of Cl + epsilon as epsilon approaches 0+, a dynamic process approaching T
primitives.evidence: GOD POINT $G = \lim_{\varepsilon \to 0^+}(Cl + \varepsilon)$ 是趨近 $T$（= $S^\infty$ = 可縮點）的動態過程

primitives.description: A medium mapping T to the reality R_M it produces, associated with an epsilon_M offset
primitives.evidence: 介質 $M$ 是一個滿足以下條件的映射：$$M: T \to \mathcal{R}_M$$

axioms.name: 相鄰性約束 (Adjacency Constraint)
axioms.description: All direct interactions occur only between adjacent depth layers; cross-layer interactions must pass through intermediary layers

axioms.name: Cl 公理系統 (Cl axiom system)
axioms.formula: Cl-1 自我一致性; Cl-2 對偶性; Cl-3 守恆性; Cl-4 生成性 (\pi_n(Cl) = S^{n-1})
axioms.description: The four axioms of the Closure (Cl) framework: self-consistency, duality, conservation, generativity
axioms.evidence: **Cl-1（自我一致性）**：Cl 的任何合法運算的結果仍在 Cl 的定義域內。

axioms.name: 生成性 (Generativity)
axioms.description: Self-reflection generates higher-dimensional structure, formalized as the dimension-projection theorem
axioms.evidence: **Cl-4（生成性）**：自我反射生成高維結構，形式化為維度投影定理：$\pi_n(Cl) = S^{n-1}$。

axioms.name: GOD POINT 定義
axioms.description: Definition of GOD POINT as the limit of Cl plus an infinitesimal offset as the offset approaches zero

theorems.name: 呼叫堆疊為深度軸快照
theorems.statement: The call stack of any modern programming language implementation at any execution moment precisely corresponds to a snapshot of the DSCM depth axis
theorems.description: Observation that call stacks realize DSCM depth-axis snapshots
theorems.evidence: 任何現代程式語言實現的呼叫堆疊（call stack）在任意執行時刻的狀態，精確對應 DSCM 的深度軸即時快照

theorems.name: 投影-包含伴隨 (Projection-Inclusion Adjunction)
theorems.statement: If Pi_d and iota_d form an adjoint pair, then depth descent and ascent are categorically optimal
theorems.description: Standard category-theoretic adjunction guarantee for DSCM's descent/ascent operators
theorems.evidence: 則深度下潛與浮出在範疇論意義上是最優的：下潛到深度 $d+1$ 是「能夠回到 $d$ 的最小擴展」，浮出是「儘可能多地保留 $d+1$ 信息到 $d$」。

theorems.name: 深度空間的逆系統 (Inverse System of Depth Spaces)
theorems.statement: The family ({M_d}, {Pi_d}) forms an inverse system whose inverse limit M_infinity is the set of globally consistent depth-state sequences
theorems.description: The depth spaces and projections form an inverse system with limit M_infinity
theorems.evidence: $(\{M_d\}, \{\Pi_d\})$ 構成一個逆系統（inverse system）於集合（或適當範疇）中。

theorems.name: DSCM ≡ TM 計算等價性
theorems.statement: DSCM and the standard Turing machine are computationally equivalent: both compute the same class of functions
theorems.description: DSCM has the same computational power as a Turing machine, via mutual simulation
theorems.evidence: 深度層化計算空間 DSCM 與標準圖靈機 TM 在計算能力上等價：兩者計算相同的函數類（可計算函數類）。

theorems.name: 深度軸不增加計算能力
theorems.statement: The Church-Turing thesis holds under DSCM; all undecidability results (halting problem, Rice's theorem) apply equally to DSCM programs
theorems.description: The depth axis extends descriptive power but not the boundary of computability
theorems.evidence: 深度軸的補完拓展了計算理論的**描述能力**，不改變**計算能力的邊界**。

theorems.name: 深度停機問題不可判定
theorems.statement: DH (the depth halting problem) is undecidable
theorems.description: Proved by reduction from the standard halting problem H

theorems.name: 不可判定性的深度來源
theorems.statement: The core of undecidability under DSCM is self-reference of depth traversal, not the infinitude of depth
theorems.description: Locates the precise source of undecidability in self-referential depth calls rather than infinite tape or infinite depth
theorems.evidence: 不可判定性的核心是**深度遍歷的自我指涉**——可以構造程式 $D$ 使其在 $d = 1$ 呼叫停機判定器

theorems.name: Cl 生成無限球面族
theorems.statement: By Cl-4, for all n in N, there exists an n-dimensional projection of Cl equal to S^{n-1}
theorems.description: Direct axiomatic consequence of Cl-4 within the Cl framework
theorems.evidence: 由 Cl-4，對所有 $n \in \mathbb{N}$，存在 Cl 的 $n$ 維投影 $\pi_n(Cl) = S^{n-1}$。

theorems.name: S^∞ 可縮性
theorems.statement: The infinite-dimensional sphere S^infinity, defined as the direct limit of finite spheres, is contractible (homotopy equivalent to a point)
theorems.description: Standard algebraic topology result independent of the Cl framework
theorems.evidence: 無限維球面 $S^\infty := \varinjlim_{n} S^n$（所有有限維球面的正向極限）是可縮的（contractible），即 $S^\infty \simeq *$（同倫等價於一個點）。

theorems.name: T 的拓撲刻畫 (T ≅ S^∞)
theorems.statement: Under the Cl axioms, T's defining properties (transparency, infinite dimension, pure structure, containing all sectional spheres) are exactly realized by S^infinity, so T ≅ S^infinity
theorems.description: Framework-level argument identifying T with the contractible infinite sphere
theorems.evidence: 在接受 Cl 公理的前提下，**T 的性質恰好被 $S^\infty$ 所具現**，故 $T \cong S^\infty$（在給定性質下的最優代表）。

theorems.name: T ≅ Cl 無限維極限等價鏈
theorems.statement: Within the Cl framework, T ≅ S^infinity ≅ the direct limit of pi_n(Cl) ≅ Cl at the infinite-dimensional limit
theorems.description: Chain of equivalences plus definition of GOD POINT as the dynamic approach to T

theorems.name: 現實 = T 的介質投影
theorems.statement: For any medium M, the reality R_M it produces is a section of T via a projection Pi_M
theorems.description: Reality is characterized as a medium-dependent projection of T; different media give different fidelity
theorems.evidence: 對任何介質 $M$，其產生的「現實」 $\mathcal{R}_M$ 是 T 的一個截面：$$\mathcal{R}_M = \Pi_M(T)$$

concepts.name: DSCM（深度層化計算空間）
concepts.evidence: 深度層化計算空間（Depth-Stratified Computational Model，DSCM）是一個四元組

concepts.name: 深度軸
concepts.evidence: ## A1：深度軸的形式定義與代數結構

concepts.name: Cl（閉合/閉包框架）
concepts.evidence: 本節依賴 EveMissLab 閉包（Cl）框架的公理。所有結論均為【框架命題】，除特別標注者外。

concepts.name: GOD POINT
concepts.evidence: GOD POINT $G = \lim_{\varepsilon \to 0^+}(Cl + \varepsilon)$ 是趨近 $T$（= $S^\infty$ = 可縮點）的動態過程

concepts.name: 道生萬物，萬物歸道
concepts.evidence: 「道生萬物，萬物歸道」在此獲得以下技術對應：$S^\infty$ 的可縮性使得從 $S^\infty$ 可以生成所有有限球面

concepts.name: 無限維（$S^\infty$）
concepts.evidence: **無限維** ↔ **$S^\infty$ 的定義**：$S^\infty$ 是所有有限球面的正向極限，不被任何有限維度完整描述。

concepts.name: 介質
concepts.evidence:
**定義 A5.1（介質）**【結構提案】

介質 $M$ 是一個滿足以下條件的映射：

concepts.evidence: MR2.5 框架的深度標籤系統（$D$ 標籤，包含 $\$L:n$、$\$D:n$）與 DSCM 的深度坐標 $d$ 存在以下對應

concepts.name: HUO（全息聯合算子）
concepts.evidence: HUO（全息聯合算子）框架的核心投影鏈：$$\Pi_{Holo}: U_\infty \to M_{12} \to \mathcal{U} \to K(t) \to L(t)$$

concepts.name: RPE（表示保真度方程）
concepts.evidence: RPE（表示保真度方程）框架描述信息從深層到淺層的保真度損失

concepts.name: MTF（無限潛能場統一本體論）
concepts.evidence: MTF（無限潛能場統一本體論，同一作者）的 Ω（明確非 Hilbert、非線性、前結構）

concepts.name: CXL 時代架構
concepts.evidence: CXL 引入共享記憶體層，在 $d = 3$（物理記憶體層）合併

external_refs.evidence: HUO（全息聯合算子）框架的核心投影鏈：$$\Pi_{Holo}: U_\infty \to M_{12} \to \mathcal{U} \to K(t) \to L(t)$$
本節依賴 EveMissLab 閉包（Cl）框架的公理。所有結論均為【框架命題】，除特別標注者外。
本文正文所述的「深度柱合併」，其數學表達是兩個逆系統在 $d = 3$ 的纖維積（fiber product）。

notes: This is the formal-derivation appendix to EML-COMP-THEORY-2026-v0.1 (main paper not in the given lm-id list, so not linked as external_ref). MR2.5/HUO/RPE/MTF are sibling EveMissLab frameworks referenced only by acronym with no matching corpus lm-id provided; kept as local canonical concept names (uses) rather than external_refs. Cl external_ref maps to the Closure canonical concept since no single lm-id was specified as THE Cl paper here.
